For most women, screening starts at age 45 and continues every two years. However, based on your personal or family...

title: AST Kasilof River Guide and Guided Fishing: Kasilof River [AK25065808]
incident_type: Kasilof River Guide and Guided Fishing
summary: On 7/6/2025 at approximately 0626 hours, Alaska Wildlife Troopers were patrolling the Kasilof River. An investigation revealed that Joshua Miller age 27 from Washington, a registered guide, was conducting a guided sportfishing trip on the Kasilof River. Joshua Miller was seen fishing from the shore in an area where guides are not allowed to fish. Joshua Miller was issued a mandatory court citation, and it was filed with the Kenai Court.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
topic: Kasilof River Guide and Guided Fishing

title: Tundra fire on Alaska’s North Slope among the biggest in recent years
summary: Smoke from the Ikpikpuk Fire is seen on June 23 in this satellite image from Planet Labs Inc. (Image provided by Ben Jones/University of Alaska Fairbanks) A lightning-sparked fire that has burned about 2,000 acres of Arctic Alaska tundra is the biggest wildfire on the North Slope in eight years. The Ikpikpuk Fire , which bears the name of a 195-mile river that flows north into the Arctic Ocean, was discovered on June 22. Though classified as active, it is unstaffed...

Following an investigation, Michael was found to be impaired by alcohol, arrested, and remanded to Fairbanks Correctional Center for DUI.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Assault 4/Criminal Mischief: Fairbanks [AK25066459]
summary: On July 8, 2025, Alaska State Troopers responded to a disturbance near Pepperdine Drive in Fairbanks. Investigation revealed that Joseph Anthony Duran had physically assaulted another individual and damaged his personal property. Joseph was arrested and remanded to Fairbanks Correctional Center.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Assault 4 (DV): Wasilla [AK25066445]
summary: On 7/8/2025 at 0157 hours AST received a report of a disturbance at a residence on Kyrsten Circle. Investigation revealed that Walter Galila, 32 YOA, had assaulted a family member causing injury. Walter was arrested and remanded to MSPRT, where he was held without bail. Walter was charged with two c...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST DUI: Fairbanks [AK25066470]
summary: On 7-8-25 AST stopped a vehicle for a moving violation. The driver was identified as Sharae Harding, age 19 of Fairbanks. Investigation showed that she was impaired. She was arrested for DUI and remanded to FCC.

title: Putting Young Leaders at the Heart of Arctic Policy Making
summary: One young leader examines why young leaders must be involved in Arctic policy development and knowledge production. The post Putting Young Leaders at the Heart of Arctic Policy Making appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: AST Warrant Arrest Theft 2: Wasilla [AK25066270]
summary: On 07/08/2025 at approximately 0438 hours, AST contacted Sergy Serov, 40 YOA, in the parking lot of Meadow Lakes Circle K. Investigation revealed that Sergy had an outstanding warrant for his arrest for a Fail to Appear that stemmed from a Theft 2 charge. Sergy was arrested and transported to MSPT,....

title: National Park Service asks for tips after boat injures whale in Glacier Bay National Park
summary: Photographs of injured humpback whale #2583. Left: Whale #2583 on June 16th, prior to being injured. Right: June 27th with a deep gash behind the dorsal fin. Photos taken under the authority of Scientific Research Permit #27027 issued by NOAA Fisheries. (Janet Neilson photos/National Park Service) O...

title: Sick leave is now mandatory in Alaska. Here’s what you need to know.
summary: The offices of the Alaska Department of Labor and Workforce Development in Juneau are seen on Thursday, Oct. 26, 2023. (Photo by James Brooks/Alaska Beacon) On July 1, Alaska’s new sick-leave and minimum wage increase law took effect.
